name: Cal.com (npx)
description: Manage Cal.com bookings and event types with natural language. Create, reschedule, and cancel bookings, list and update event types, and query availability through the official Cal.com MCP server.

inputs.label: Cal.com API Key
inputs.description: Your Cal.com API key. Used to authenticate against the Cal.com API for managing bookings and event types.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open Cal.com Settings > Developer > API keys
2. Click 'Add' to create a new API key
3. (Optional) Set an expiration date
4. Copy the generated key (starts with cal_live_)

auth.instructions: Create an API key at Cal.com Settings > Developer > API keys and provide it as CAL_API_KEY.
